subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of Eternity, revealed from the presence of the All-Glorious unto him who hath been named Mahdi in the Tablets of transcendent glory. Be thou assured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب البقا من لدی البهاء الی الذی سمی بمهدی فی الواح عز عظیما ان اطمئن فی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
